class.name: ClaudeMCPDock
class.brief_description: Editor dock for Claude MCP server status and configuration.
class.description: Provides a UI panel in the Godot editor for monitoring the MCP server status, viewing tool call logs, and copying configuration for Claude Code integration.

method.name: set_mcp_server
method.description: Sets the MCP server instance to monitor.

method.name: get_mcp_server
method.description: Returns the current MCP server instance.
